name: Asian Sea Corporation Public Company Limited
summary: Asian Sea Corporation Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells processed frozen seafood products in Thailand, the United States, Japan, Italy, the United Kingdom, and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Frozen and Canned Food Products, Feed Stuff, and Other Business. Its products include frozen shrimp, tuna, sillago, and frozen squid products. The company also produces ready-to-cook or ready-to-eat processed seafood products; ready-to-eat products packed in cans, pouches, or plastic cups, such as fried rice, pasta, and tuna in curry sauce; pet food products; and aquaculture feed pellets. In addition, it produces animal feed, fishmeal, and feedstuff; distributes frozen seafood; and provides cold storage services, as well as is involved in the marketing and management activities. The company offers its products under the ASIAN FEED, Monchou, A.S.S., Blue Chef, Asian Surat, SAKURA, TCC, KIKU, Hero, Victor, Allstar, Rambo, SuperHero, Ruay Puan, and Faster brand names. Asian Sea Corporation Public Company Limited was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Mueang Samut Sakhon, Thailand.
